features.name: Menu bar tray icon + window toggle
features.notes: Tray 🦞 emoji silhouette PNG (data URI), setIgnoreDoubleClickEvents, windowVisible flag toggle, click to show/hide

features.name: Frameless resizable window with drag/pin
features.notes: frame:false, vibrancy:popover, alwaysOnTop toggle

features.name: Embed OpenClaw Control UI via iframe
features.notes: CSP header stripping in Electron, loading/error states

features.name: Settings panel (Gateway URL + auth)
features.notes: URL, token, password fields, theme selector, persistent to ~/.clawbar/settings.json

features.name: Light/dark theme with system follow
features.notes: CSS variables, data-theme attribute, nativeTheme listener

features.name: Dock hidden (menu bar only)
features.notes: app.dock.hide(), skipTaskbar:true

features.name: Visual test: Playwright screenshot verification
features.notes: 9 interactive tests, light/dark/settings screenshots

features.name: End-to-end test with real OpenClaw instance
features.notes: Token auth verified. Direct WS connection works. Chat send/receive via OpenClaw custom protocol.

features.name: Window position persistence
features.notes: Remember drag position, restore on next show. Reset if off-screen.

features.name: ESC key hides window (non-pin)
features.notes: globalShortcut or webContents key listener

features.name: Right-click context menu on tray
features.notes: Show/Hide + Quit

features.name: Auto-launch on login
features.notes: app.setLoginItemSettings, settings toggle

features.name: DMG packaging and distribution
features.notes: electron-builder arm64 + x64

features.name: Remove unused dependencies
features.notes: No longer needed after WebView refactor

features.name: Compact chat UI via WebSocket
features.notes: Custom chat UI using OpenClaw WS protocol. Ed25519 device identity, SHA-256(pubkey) deviceId, challenge-response auth. chat.send with message+idempotencyKey, streaming via event='chat' payload.state delta/final.

features.name: Classic/Compact mode toggle
features.notes: Button in TitleBar and input area. Window resize on mode switch.

features.name: Session management (list, switch, create, delete)
features.notes: Session dropdown in ChatHistory, switch with history fetch, create new session, delete with fallback. API: sessions.list/delete/patch.

features.name: Approval notifications (exec.approval.requested)
features.notes: Rewrote to match real OpenClaw format (id, request.command/cwd/host/agentId, expiresAtMs). Three buttons: Allow once, Always allow, Deny. Auto-expire. Details table.

features.name: Sessions list page
features.notes: SessionsView component with full session list, agent badges, click-to-switch, delete confirmation, time-ago display.

features.name: Usage statistics view
features.notes: Fixed: calls sessions.usage with date range params. Date pills (Today/7d/30d). Per-session breakdown with tokens, cost, messages, tool calls.

features.name: Left sidebar navigation (Claude mobile style)
features.notes: Sidebar overlay with Lucide icons. Nav: Chat, Sessions, Usage, Cron, Agents, Skills, Logs, Settings.

features.name: Lucide React icons
features.notes: Replaced all emoji icons with Lucide SVGs (MessageSquare, Clock, Bot, Puzzle, ScrollText, etc.)

features.name: Cron jobs view
features.notes: CronView: cron.status API, job cards, enabled badge, next wake. Read-only.

features.name: Agents view
features.notes: AgentsView: status API, agent cards with heartbeat info. Read-only.

features.name: Skills view
features.notes: SkillsView: skills.status API, skill grid with emoji, source badges, requirements. Read-only.

features.name: Logs viewer
features.notes: LogsView: logs.tail subscription, level filters, monospace auto-scroll. Read-only.
